overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in cowboy attire walking through a rainy, muddy historic town. The character moves from a cluttered backyard through a narrow alley and onto the main street of the settlement, passing wooden and brick buildings with clotheslines and telegraph poles visible.

events.description: character walks through wooden gate at the end of the courtyard
enters narrow enclosed alley between tall walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy courtyard toward a wooden gate, passing clotheslines and barrels

notable_agents.action: standing still near the wooden shed, watching the player character

entered.detail: two-story building with red plaster walls and white window frames
weathered dark wooden structure with open entrance
ropes strung overhead with white and colored garments hanging
stacked wooden barrels near the shed
simple wooden fence gate leading to the alley

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a muddy backyard courtyard surrounded by a red plaster building and a dark wooden shed. Clotheslines with laundry hang overhead as rain falls steadily. An NPC stands near the shed watching as the character walks toward and through a wooden gate at the far end of the yard, entering a narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between weathered wooden and red brick walls

events.description: moves from open courtyard into narrow enclosed alley with high walls
character stops to open iron gate at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow muddy alley, approaching the iron gate at the end

entered.detail: tall wall made of vertical weathered wooden planks with green moss
tall wall made of red bricks with some white patches
black metal gate with vertical bars blocking the alley exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed alley flanked by a weathered wooden wall on the left and a red brick wall on the right. The space is tight and muddy, with rain still falling. At the end of the alley, the character approaches and begins to open an iron gate leading out of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy main street of Western town with wooden sidewalks

events.description: exits narrow alley through iron gate into open town street
character turns slightly left while walking to survey the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the muddy main street, passing various storefronts and buildings, looking around the town

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the side of the muddy street

entered.detail: red brick building with second-floor balcony and green shutters
black carriage with large wheels parked near the building
tall narrow brick building with faded painted signage on the side
tall wooden pole with crossbars and wires
row of old wooden buildings with balconies and blue shutters

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the character enters the muddy main street of a historic Western town. Two-story brick buildings with balconies line the street, along with weathered wooden storefronts. A horse-drawn carriage sits parked on the left, and wooden telegraph poles run along the right side. The character continues walking down the rain-soaked road, passing various buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, rainy courtyard through a tight passage and out onto a bustling historic main street. It begins in a muddy backyard surrounded by a red plaster building and a wooden shed, moving under hanging laundry as the character passes an NPC and exits through a wooden gate. As the character enters a narrow alley, the environment tightens between a weathered wooden wall and a red brick facade before approaching an iron gate at the far end. The scene then opens wide as the character emerges from the passage onto a rain-soaked main street lined with two-story brick buildings and wooden storefronts. Finally, the camera follows the character down the muddy road, passing a parked horse-drawn carriage and a row of telegraph poles.
